stimulus: When chopsticks were first introduced to many parts of Southeast Asia in the medieval period, they were sometimes met with skepticism. A leading scholar in one royal court rejected the new utensils because he considered ______blank impractical and ostentatious additions to the royal table.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The plural pronoun “them” agrees with the plural antecedent “utensils.”

Choices B, C, and D are all singular pronouns that don’t agree with the plural antecedent.
